zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernhard II. zur Lippe於大約1140年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 索斯特利普斯塔特時，他的父親Hermann I. zur Lippe30歲，母親unbekannt16歲。他於1167年與Heilwig von Are Hochstaden結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1224年4月30日在拉脫維亞包斯卡斯 諾瓦茲梅若特斯 帕加斯次享年85歲，埋葬在拉脫維亞利加布ll 沙拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernhard II. zur Lippe于大约1140年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 索斯特利普斯塔特时，他的父亲Hermann I. zur Lippe30岁，母亲unbekannt16岁。他于1167年与Heilwig von Are Hochstaden结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1224年4月30日在拉脱维亚包斯卡斯 諾瓦茲梅若特斯 帕加斯次享年85岁，埋葬在拉脱维亚利加布ll 沙拉。

nameMeanings.name: zur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ofer, Yael, Amikam, Amram, Ari, Uri.
Jewish (Israeli): artificial name from Hebrew tsur ‘rock’. In some cases it may also be a translation of some original Ashkenazic surname with similar meaning (e.g. Fels or Stein ).
Polish (Żur): nickname from żur ‘sour soup’ (see Zurek ). Compare Schur .

variants.name: Fels
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Kurt, Sieglinde, Wolfgang.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near high ground or by a prominent crag, from Middle High German vels ‘rock, cliff’.

nameMeanings.name: Lippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the duchy of Lippe, which became an independent state in the 12th century.
German: topographic name for someone living on the banks of the Lippe river in Westphalia.

variants.name: Lipp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Frieda, Hans, Wendelin, Franz, Konrad, Otto, Rainer, Ralf.
English: nickname from Middle English lippe ‘lip’ (Old English lippa).
English: from the Middle English personal name Leppe, Lippe (pet forms of one or more Old English names containing Lēof- ‘dear, beloved’ as the first element). Compare Lewin 1.

nameMeanings.name: Bernhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bernard
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernhard II. zur Lippe was born about 1140, in Lippstadt, Soest, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Hermann I. zur Lippe, was 30 and his mother, unbekannt, was 16. He married Heilwig von Are Hochstaden in 1167. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 30 April 1224, in Mežotnes pagasts, Bauska, Latvia, at the age of 85, and was buried in Buļļu Sala, Riga, Latvia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernhard II. zur Lippe est né environ 1140, à Lippstadt, Kreis Soest, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Hermann I. zur Lippe, avait 30 ans et sa mère, unbekannt, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Heilwig von Are Hochstaden en 1167. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 avril 1224, à Mežotnes pagasts, Bauskas novads, Lettonie, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Buļļu Sala, Rīga, Lettonie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernhard II. zur Lippe um 1140 in Lippstadt, Kreis Soest, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hermann I. zur Lippe 30 und seine Mutter unbekannt 16. Er hat 1167 Heilwig von Are Hochstaden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. April 1224 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Mežotnes pagasts, Bauskas novads, Lettland und wurde in Buļļu Sala, Rīga, Lettland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernhard II. zur Lippe è nato il circa 1140 nel Lippstadt, Kreis Soest, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Hermann I. zur Lippe, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, unbekannt, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Heilwig von Are Hochstaden nel 1167. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 aprile 1224, nel Mežotnes pagasts, Bauskas novads, Lettonia, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Buļļu Sala, Rīga, Lettonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernhard II. zur Lippeが約1140年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス ソエストリップスタトで生まれた時，父Hermann I. zur Lippeは30歳，母unbekanntは16歳であった。1167年にHeilwig von Are Hochstadenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1224年4月30日にラトビアバウスカス ノヴァズメzオトンス プアガスツで85歳で死去し，ラトビアルiガブllウ サラにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernhard II. zur Lippe(이)가 대략 1140년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 소스트 립스타드트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hermann I. zur Lippe(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 unbekannt(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1167년 Heilwig von Are Hochstaden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1224년 4월 30일 라트비아 바스카스 노바드즈 z트네스 파가스츠에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 라트비아 i가 버ll 살라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernhard II. zur Lippe nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Lippstadt, Kreis Soest, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Hermann I. zur Lippe, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, unbekannt, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Heilwig von Are Hochstaden em 1167. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de abril de 1224, em Mežotnes pagasts, Bauskas novads, Letónia, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Buļļu Sala, Rīga, Letónia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernhard II. zur Lippe родился около 1140 г. в местности липпстадт, крис соест, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Hermann I. zur Lippe было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали unbekannt, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Heilwig von Are Hochstaden в 1167 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 апреля 1224 г. в местности меzотнесь пагасц, баускас новадс, Латвия в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности буllу сала, Рига, Латвия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernhard II. zur Lippe nació aproximadamente 1140, en Lippstadt, Kreis Soest, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Hermann I. zur Lippe, tenía 30 años y su mamá, unbekannt, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Heilwig von Are Hochstaden en 1167. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de abril de 1224, en Mežotnes pagasts, Bauskas novads, Letonia, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Buļļu Sala, Rīga, Letonia.
